parameters.query:
WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO db_size_history (total_bytes, table_count, by_table_top20)
  SELECT
    pg_database_size(current_database())::bigint,
    (SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public'),
    (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.size_bytes DESC) FROM (
      SELECT table_name AS name, pg_total_relation_size('public.'||quote_ident(table_name))::bigint AS size_bytes
        FROM information_schema.tables
       WHERE table_schema='public'
       ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size('public.'||quote_ident(table_name)) DESC
       LIMIT 20
    ) t)
  RETURNING total_mb, snapshot_at, by_table_top20
),
week_ago AS (
  SELECT total_mb FROM db_size_history WHERE snapshot_at < now() - INTERVAL '6 days' AND snapshot_at > now() - INTERVAL '8 days' ORDER BY snapshot_at DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'now_mb', (SELECT total_mb FROM ins),
  'week_ago_mb', (SELECT total_mb FROM week_ago),
  'growth_pct_7d', CASE WHEN (SELECT total_mb FROM week_ago) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT total_mb FROM week_ago) > 0
    THEN round(100.0 * ((SELECT total_mb FROM ins) - (SELECT total_mb FROM week_ago)) / (SELECT total_mb FROM week_ago), 1)
    ELSE NULL
  END,
  'top_table', (SELECT (by_table_top20->0->>'name') FROM ins),
  'top_table_mb', (SELECT round(((by_table_top20->0->>'size_bytes')::numeric / 1048576), 2) FROM ins)
) AS report;

SELECT raise_security_event(
  'unusual_access_pattern'::text,
  'medium'::text,
  'cron'::text, '/cron_db_size_check'::text, 'db_size'::text, NULL::uuid,
  'BD crece rapido: ' || ($1::numeric) || ' MB ahora vs ' || COALESCE(($2::numeric)::text, 'N/A') || ' MB hace 7d (' || COALESCE(($3::numeric)::text, 'N/A') || '% en 7d). Top tabla: ' || $4 || ' (' || ($5::numeric) || ' MB).',
  $6::jsonb
) AS event_id;
INSERT INTO activity_log (action, agent_name, details) VALUES ('db_size_snapshot_ok', 'cron_db_size_check', $1::jsonb);
